block_00: A new payment method to try out!
block_03: We are convinced that no matter how many payment methods we offer, adding another one is always a good idea, especially if it is faster and more convenient for you to use. That is why we are happy to announce that we are in the process of bringing in a new payment method that we hope will pique your interest.
block_04: For instance, it will allow you to receive money much faster: it will take us less than one business day to process your payment in comparison to the usual up to three business days processing period.
block_05: Here is what also makes this payment method stand out:
block_06: FCA-regulated payment provider and a Principal Member of Mastercard.
block_07: Instant virtual debit cards and free plastic Mastercard for hassle-free payments.
block_10: If you are interested in checking out the fastest payments we ever offered among the first few, please contact your manager for more detailed information. Stay tuned and see you soon!
